## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet build src/SalesToSignature.sln`
- [ ] `dotnet test src/SalesToSignature.sln`
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior or setup changed

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and does not bundle unrelated changes
- [ ] Tests cover the change or the reason for no tests is explained
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data were added
- [ ] Breaking changes are called out explicitly
